questions.text: What is the hot star that gives our planet light?
Why do astronauts float everywhere when they are in outer space?

What must an astronaut wear to give them air to breathe when they go outside into space?
Outer space is completely silent. Why can't we hear sound in space?
options: Because there is no air for sound to travel through
Because the stars are too bright

questions.text: The vehicle that uses a ton of fire and energy to push away from Earth's gravity and travel to space.
The big grey rock in our night sky that has giant holes called craters.
The circle path that a planet takes to go all the way around the Sun.
In your own words, write 2 or 3 sentences explaining why it is important for Eco-Astronauts to recycle. What happens to the Earth if we make too much trash?
